candidate.title: Substack Monetization Audits
candidate.problem_or_desire: Creators struggling to convert free subscribers into paid members
candidate.core_concept: A manual 10-point audit tool focused purely on the 'pricing page' conversion funnel

candidate.prototype_scope: Ten free experimental audits performed for beta users

candidate.title: Remote Heritage Immersion Kitchen
candidate.target_user: Expats seeking nostalgia and traditional cooking comfort
candidate.problem_or_desire: Failure of traditional catering to capture regional specific 'feel' of comfort home-cooking
candidate.core_concept: Crowdsourced historical cook books localized into professional recipe standards by diaspora community cooks
candidate.proposed_approach: Pairing a certified older migrant cook to coach the home visitor remotely over real-time guidance tools as the customer actually prepares their own specialized regional dish
candidate.prototype_scope: Test sessions where five experts use standardized remote interface pads to walk households through four heritage dumpling recipes

candidate.title: Tech Stacks Lifecycle Steward
candidate.problem_or_desire: Underutilized 'seat licenses' contributing to phantom software spending.
candidate.core_concept: Continuous entitlement auditing via automated API connection to single sign-on access logs.
candidate.proposed_approach: Periodic cross-comparison of user access timestamps against user seating assignment lists, highlighting license retirement recommendations.
candidate.prototype_scope: Script that performs a one-time automated scan of two disparate identity management SaaS platform usage records.
